safeStatic.name: Jedi Hunter
safeStatic.enginePath: AbilityExecutionCoordinator -> PassiveAdapter.MODIFIER -> ModifierEngine -> DefenseCalculator/DerivedCalculator defense adjustments
safeStatic.reason: Canon text grants +1 insight bonus to Fortitude Defense and Will Defense. The separate +1 die damage against Force-sensitive targets remains deferred to target-context damage handling.
safeStatic.recommendedAction: Canon text grants +1 insight bonus to Fortitude Defense and Will Defense. The separate +1 die damage against Force-sensitive targets remains deferred to target-context damage handling.

engineChanges.change: Implemented Master of Elegance through the existing damage ability contribution helper; no static sheet total mutation.
Aligned PASSIVE/RULE validation with the existing PassiveAdapter/RuleCollector rules-array shape.
Allowed PASSIVE/RULE entries to consume either abilityMeta.rules[] or legacy abilityMeta.rule for rule collection.
Neutralized legacy Greater Weapon Focus ActiveEffect because the generic talent requires a persistent selected weapon group/exotic weapon.

recommendedFirstRuntimeHooks.reason: Clear, common Elite Trooper attack penalty reduction; not a static attack bonus.
Clear removal of Rapid Shot penalty; needs attack option context.
Clear stun weapon context: +1 attack and +1 die stun damage.
Clear Damage Threshold bonus only while taking damage for an ally through a talent.
Useful persistent-choice talent family; should not use generic ActiveEffects.
Clear weapon-group penalty reduction needs attack sequence context.
Needs selected target state, then runtime damage/condition-track hooks.
Needs Elite Trooper DR and armor Fortitude bonus context, not static Fortitude.
Needs token positioning and selected flank target; punt until context exists.

notes: Per user instruction, target-specific bonuses such as +X against a marked/opponent/Force-sensitive target were not converted into automatic modifiers unless the exact target context already exists.
The pass favors removing false passive/static bonuses over inventing new tree-specific code.
Master of Elegance was implemented through an existing shared combat-stat helper because the rule is directly knowable from actor talent + weapon context.
Jedi Hunter retains only the unconditional +1 insight Fortitude/Will bonuses; the Force-sensitive-target damage die remains deferred.
